name: Dorian “The Wise”

sheet.name: Dorian “The Wise”
sheet.background_story:
‪Dorian “The wise”  stands in the gate of Turlo. He has seen many things… many cicles… He has seen Gods rise and fall. He saw hidden in the shadows how people jump in the fires in the church of Mother Agora ‬

‪He has seen the Dark Blades gather and gain strength. He has seen M3RL1N’S journey and witness Bald Savior tournament.  His true intentions are still a mystery.
